posts.message:
🚨 MIX & MATCH DEAL ALERT 🚨

Looks like the mothership dropped off a deal too good to keep classified…

👽 10 LBS FOR JUST $30!

Mix and match any combination of:

✅ Drumsticks
✅ Thighs
✅ Leg Quarters

All from our pasture-raised chickens right here at Roswell Family Farm.

🌱 Pasture Raised
👨‍🌾 Family Grown
🥩 Quality Meat
📍 I-90 Exit 29A • Dolgeville

Whether you’re stocking the freezer, feeding a big family, firing up the grill, or meal prepping for the week, this deal is hard to beat.

⚠️ Limited availability. Once these cuts are gone, they’re gone.

📩 Message us to reserve yours.
📞 Contact us today for pickup details.

ROSWELL FAMILY FARM
Abducted by Flavor.

#RoswellFamilyFarm #AbductedByFlavor #PastureRaised #PastureRaisedChicken #ChickenSale #LocalFood #LocalFarm #FarmFresh #SupportLocalFarmers #DolgevilleNY #MohawkValley #HerkimerCounty #UpstateNY #BuyLocal #FarmToTable #ChickenDrumsticks #ChickenThighs #LegQuarters #FreezerStockUp #FamilyFarm #SmallFarmBigFlavor #Exit29A #ShopLocal #RaisedRight #FarmFreshFood

🛸 THEY CALL IT CHICKEN.
WE CALL IT A CLOSE ENCOUNTER.

Not all chicken is created equal.

At Roswell Family Farm, our chickens are raised on pasture with room to roam, fresh air, sunshine, and the care that only a family farm can provide.

Whether you’re looking for:

🐔 Whole Chickens
🍗 Wings
🍗 Drumsticks
🍗 Thighs
🍗 Leg Quarters
🍗 Breasts

…you’re getting chicken raised the way nature intended.

No added water.
No fillers.
No mystery.

Just real chicken from a local family farm.

And yes, our tenderloin stays attached to the breast where nature intended—because a chicken breast should actually be a chicken breast.

📍 Roswell Family Farm
🛣 I-90 Exit 29A – Dolgeville, NY

The truth is out there…

SO IS BETTER CHICKEN.

Fresh from our pastures to your table.

🛸 Before you go…

What’s your favorite cut of chicken?

🍗 Wings
🍗 Thighs
🍗 Drumsticks
🍗 Leg Quarters
🍗 Breasts
🐔 Whole Chicken

Let us know below!
